name: ai-context entry
purpose: Stable portable AI entrypoint. Read this repository JSON indexes first, then load source markdown/rules/skills only when selected by task context. Do not rely on home-level compatibility files.
workflowOrder: Use ai-context-init after install to collect local profile, projects, scenes, skills, and rules.
Use project and scene indexes to select only the context needed for the current task.
When work should survive the chat, create or update runtime task state with contextctl task start/update/finish before implementation.
defaultReadOrder: config/skills/skills.json only when skill selection is needed
config/rules/rules.json only when rule lookup is needed
bundles/skills/ai-context-init/SKILL.md when the user is onboarding or initializing ai-context

routingDecision.projectsIndex: Read config/projects/index.json first as the candidate list. Use id, name, technologyFamilyId, path, and summary to choose matched project JSON files.
routingDecision.projectDetail: After selecting a project, read config/projects/<project-id>.json for doc path, mounted skills, scenes, rules, and source read policy.
routingDecision.scenesIndex: Read config/scenes/index.json as the candidate list when the task may involve a workflow scene or multiple projects.
routingDecision.sceneDetail: After selecting a scene, read config/scenes/<scene-id>.json for included projects, mounted scene rules, composition reason, run/debug notes, and source scene doc path.
routingDecision.fallback: If no project or scene is clear, ask one concise clarification instead of reading all source documents.

sourceReadPolicy.homeCompatibility: Do not read or require home-level compatibility files by default. Treat this repository entry and JSON indexes as the portable source of truth.
sourceReadPolicy.projectDocs: Read docs/repos/*.md only after a project JSON is selected and the summary is insufficient.
sourceReadPolicy.scenes: Read docs/scenes/*.md only after a scene JSON is selected and detailed workflow text is needed.
sourceReadPolicy.rules: Read config/rules/rules.json first. Active rule sources under bundles/rules/** are loaded only when selected by project, scene, or task gate.
sourceReadPolicy.skills: Read active bundles/skills/** only when task state, project JSON, or an explicit user request triggers the skill.
sourceReadPolicy.profile: A fresh install has no long profile. Run ai-context-init to create local profile details.

installation.globalEntrypointsStatus: deprecated; do not create home-level AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, or WORK_CONTEXT.md by default
installation.afterInstall: Ask the AI tool to run the ai-context-init skill to initialize profile, projects, scenes, skills, and rules.

taskFlow.defaultBehavior: Fresh install has no active task. Create task JSON only when the user starts work that should survive the chat.
commands: node scripts/contextctl.mjs task update [task-id] --gate <G1-G7> --note "<progress or decision>"
node scripts/contextctl.mjs task finish [task-id] --note "<verification and handoff>"
